title: Perform board duties
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform board duties demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Remove contamination from the fleece

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify WHS hazards and report to the supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, use and fit suitable personal protective equipment (PPE) correctly.

pcs.text: Remove urine stain wool, black/coloured wool and contamination on the shearing board as instructed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove urine stain wool, black/coloured wool and contamination on the shearing board as instructed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove urine stain wool, black/coloured wool and contamination on the shearing board as instructed.

pcs.text: Apply safe working practices and use the available safety equipment according to WHS standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply safe working practices and use the available safety equipment according to WHS standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply safe working practices and use the available safety equipment according to WHS standards.

elements.title: Remove fleeces and component parts from the shearing board

pcs.text: Identify wet wool and remove for drying

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify wet wool and remove for drying.

pcs.text: Pick belly wool up and remove urine stain wool in line with workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pick belly wool up and remove urine stain wool in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Remove crutch wool and reposition the hind leg wool if necessary

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove crutch wool and reposition the hind leg wool if necessary.

pcs.text: Arrange the hind legs of the fleece to allow for the fleece to be picked up efficiently

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange the hind legs of the fleece to allow for the fleece to be picked up efficiently.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Pick fleece up in a controlled bundle and remove from shearing stand as soon as sheep is shorn.

pcs.text: Carry fleece to the wool table and throw to land flat and spread out ready for skirting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry fleece to the wool table and throw to land flat and spread out ready for skirting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry fleece to the wool table and throw to land flat and spread out ready for skirting.

pcs.text: Collect loose wool remaining in the let-out chute in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect loose wool remaining in the let-out chute in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect loose wool remaining in the let-out chute in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Place all wool removed from the fleece and from the shearing board in the correct bins or on the correct table according to workplace standards

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place all wool removed from the fleece and from the shearing board in the correct bins or on the correct table according to workplace standards.
